articles.title: USMNT vs. Germany score: USA show positives despite loss, turn page with World Cup opener looming - CBS Sports
articles.description: A golazo from Antonee Robinson was one of the highlights for the Americans on Saturday
articles.content: The United States men's national team lost 2-1 to Germany in Chicago on Saturday in their final tune-up match ahead of the FIFA World Cup. An absolute golazo by Antonee Robinson wasn't enough to canc… [+1017 chars]
